reviews.comment:
En tres oportunidades dentro del último mes fuimos a cargar NAFTA y somos socios del ACA, pero no tuvimos el descuento por " falla eterna del sistema".

(Translated by Google)
We went to load NAFTA three times in the last month, and we are ACA members, but we didn't get the discount due to "an eternal system failure."

reviews.comment:
Parece que están en las últimas... no habia luz, no habia para pagar con tarjeta, el shop cerrado, el aca cerrado...

(Translated by Google)
It seems they're on their last legs... there was no electricity, no card payments, the shop was closed, the aca was closed...

reviews.comment:
Voy desde hace más de 20 años. Siempre muy buena la atención. La dejaron moderna y bastante completa en este último tiempo.

(Translated by Google)
I've been going there for over 20 years. The service has always been excellent. They've recently updated it and made it quite complete.
